title: Carnivourous Plants
description: Adds 3 carnivorous plant variations to Blue Orchids so you can have carnivorous plants in your swamps
body:
Adds variations for blue orchids to be:

-     Venus flytrap
-     Sarracenia (Pitcher plant)
-     Pinguicula (Butterwort)

Plants placed in pots will still be Blue Orchids. Only placed plants will have variations.
